mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forecast_weather (future_dt, main, description, temp_12, temp_min, temp_max, wind_speed_max, snapshot_time) VALUES (#{futureDt}, #{main}, #{description}, #{temp12}, #{tempMin}, #{tempMax}, #{windSpeedMax}, #{snapshotTime})

INSERT INTO forecast_weather (future_dt, main, description, temp_12, temp_min, temp_max, wind_speed_max, snapshot_time) VALUES
(#{item.futureDt}, #{item.main}, #{item.description}, #{item.temp12}, #{item.tempMin}, #{item.tempMax}, #{item.windSpeedMax}, #{item.snapshotTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, future_dt, main, description, temp_12, temp_min, temp_max, wind_speed_max, snapshot_time FROM forecast_weather WHERE snapshot_time = ( SELECT MAX(snapshot_time) FROM forecast_weather ) ORDER BY future_dt
